title: Magnetic Stirrer Set(4 Stir Bars & a Retriever), Strong Magnetic Stir Plate 3000rpm with Speed Control for Liquid Mixing, Magnetic Mixer for Chemistry, Lab, Yeast Starter, Drinks & DIYs
description:
High Quality & Long-Lasting: Equipped with a durable 316 stainless steel panel and a powerful 3000rpm speed, this magnetic stirrer delivers reliable and efficient mixing for both lab and home use. Its sturdy ABS shell design enhances drop resistance, ensuring durability and long-term performance.
Durable, High-Performance Motor: Powered by a premium motor with lockout and cutout protection, ensuring reliable, long-term performance even in extreme working environments, as proven through months of rigorous testing.
Ready-to-Go Package: This magnetic stirrer set includes 4 extra magnetic stir bars in various sizes and a 25cm (9.84-inch) magnetic stir bar retriever, offering all you need to start mixing right away. NOTICE: This product does not have a heating function, and no beaker is included in the package.
Wide Applications: Ideal for diverse uses in chemistry, lab, biology, small business, home, and kitchen environments. Perfect for mixing yeast starters, home brewing, cold brew coffee, beverages, wine tasting, nutritional supplements, essential oils; terra sig, glazes, underglazes, pottery; washing resin prints in IPA; aquarium dosing solutions, structured water, plant nutrients, mushroom liquid cultures, DIY projects, and much more.
Easy and Safe to Use: Features a simple 2-in-1 speed control knob and a fire-resistant plug for added safety and convenient hands-free operation. Silicone anti-slip feet ensure stability, delivering steady and reliable performance during use.
1-Year Warranty: Enjoy peace of mind with a 1-year warranty. A NEW REPLACEMENT will be provided if a malfunction occurs within one year. Reach out anytime for prompt assistance and effective solutions.
Safety Cautions: Keep magnetic stir bar pills out of reach of children to prevent accidental swallowing. If using the stirrer for drinks or beverages, always remember to remove the stir bar before consuming.
reviews_5s:
Works very well spins very fast if neededI have used this a few times now and it performs great. It is a great value for the money. The variable speed gives you what you need.So I tried it earlier today and it worked very well for what I needed it for.I like to use a dissolving fiber supplement (Benefiber.) It comes in powdered form and when you mix it WELL into water you barely even know it's there because it really dissolves quite well. But that takes a lot of stirring, which (thanks to this product) I can get done even when I'm working on something else across the house.

It also works well making protein shakes, but for that I only use a small amount of water to avoid clumps (think "making gravy) and then add more and more water until it's the consistency I want.

I also enjoy putting a glass beaker or flask filled with Quinine Tonic Water and turning on the stirrer in a room lit with black light to get a glowing blue light futuristic effect.

Alternatively you can dissolve B2 supplements in room temperature water for a solution that glows green-yellow under black light.

Of course SOMEONE won't be able to resist drinking the glowing water decoration. the quinine tonic water and the B2 water) would be safe for a party-goer to consume (because , but it is important not to consume the magnetic stir bars.

However take heed of these important safety considerations:

*Always remove the magnetic stir bar before consuming any beverages
*Keep the stir bars away from children as they pose a swallowing hazard
*Only use it with compatible containers (typically glass or non-magnetic materials)
*Stick to mixing water-based solutions that don't require heating
*Ensure the workspace is stable and the device has good ventilationIt's a fairly basic stir plate, comes with 4 sizes of stir bar (a good selection imo) and a sub-par retrieval tool (which will do the job just fine). I have little reason to doubt their speed/RPM and torque claims. It's definitely not a heavy duty mixer for thick stuff, but if you're in that territory it might be overhead mixer time.
It comes with a little 12v barrel jack power adapter. Eugh. It's long but the wall plug takes up too much space for my outlets.
Fun fact: You can run this off of 5v, but it will be slow and much weaker. But if you just want convenience and don't need strong stirring, definitely something to consider. You just need the appropriate barrel jack. Additionally, I have no clue if that will affect longevity.

Plate surface is metal, not terribly sturdy but will resist most damage. Comes with a protective peel on it if I remember right.

I like it, the included stir bars and retriever are a nice touch. I just wish it didn't have to run on 12v and/or have wall wart.I use a ham press to make my own homemade deli ham and lunchmeat. After cooking you have to get the temperature down close to room temperature before you store it in the fridge for the final chill and cool it off as fast as possible.

This has always been in a bowl in the sink with running water (what a waste) or with ice water that needs to be changed several times and takes almost too long to get the temperature down quickly and safely.

Along comes the magnetic stirrer. I already have the cooking vessel suspended on the rack to protect my counters from the heat of the sous vide. So, when cooking is done, I dump the hot water, remove the cooker, refresh with cold water and a few scoops of ice, and slide the magnetic stirrer unit under the cooking box (it is a plastic cambro). With the magnetic stirrer working, the interior temperature of the cooked deli ham was down to 85 degrees in less than an hour and there was still ice in the water. AMAZING.

Also, if you're planning dinner and need shrimp or other small seafood that is IQF defrosted quickly, set your stirrer up with the bowl of water, add the stir bar and the frozen food (make sure you have enough water to get a good circulation) and everything is defrosted but still chilled (keep it safe) in less than 15 minutes.

You don't need this for your lab, you NEED this for your kitchen. I highly recommend this product.I bought this to stir my gummy mix while it hot. I was having trouble getting the oil to emulsify in the water based mix. This did the trick. It was fast enough that the gummy mix stayed hot enough to still pout in molds. It's small but I didn't need a big unit as I make small batches of gummies. This gets a thumbs up for my uses.Works fantastic for mixing thin resins such as urethane without incorporating a bunch of air if your resin is too fast curing to really vacuum the bubbles. I ordered it for doing the fast resin but ended up using it on everything and I think it provides more consistent results than manual mixing. If using on resin you'll want to get another pack of stirring rods, they can be recovered if you time it right (soft rubber stage) but if you forget you'll want to have some extras.

It won't work on most epoxies or anything too goopy. For most paints and thin casting resins it's great.I've been slowly building out a small homelab for various science activities for the kids as well as other activities and this stirrer was a great addition. It is a relatively small form factor and includes three different stirrer pills with their own storage container. There is only one knob for speed control and doesn't include the beaker shown so you will need your own. Great for starting yeast and can get you to 3,000 rpm. At the price it also does not heat.I have found this magnetic stirrer to be a useful bit of equipment. It is small and light yet works well. I like that it is USB powered but would have preferred a USB power port instead of the barrel connector that is in the stirrer. I like that this comes with not only a set of 4 stirring bars but also the retrieval wand. I have found it to be powerful enough for a 1L beaker of water. So far it has been durable and I have left it on for weeks at a time with no sign of it wearing out. Overall I would recommend this magnetic stirrer.
